title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
